name: ER of Dallas
message: The ER of Dallas is a state-of-the-art medical facility that is able to handle most medical emergencies that are handled in a hospital ER. Our full-service ER is available 24/7 for emergency treatment without waiting in line. We are conveniently located on Frankford Road just off the Dallas North Freeway.(214) 613-6694    info@erofdallastx.com    (214) 613-6723https://erofdallastx.com
